subject: Re:
body:
very complex. I passed your message. . in addition Im not sure what role you and your boss would like to play in the yemen issue moving forward. . I think to progress what you and terje have spoken about, the rebel leaders are ready to propose a document they woudl like a cease fire, and halt. If you like I can pass on their proposal. THIS IS NOT WHAT I DO. my expertise is only money. . but it seems like your part of the world would like advice. very complex for me.

--

I think to progress what you and terje have spoken about, the rebel leaders are ready to propose a document they woudl like a cease fire, and halt. If you like I can pass on their proposal.
